{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015bLfXe3rMrQnkntsZg8e5N","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n    77→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    78→  if (isAuthor) {\n    79→    pendingApplicants = db\n    80→      .prepare(\n    81→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    82→         FROM listing_applications la\n    83→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    84→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    85→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    86→      )\n    87→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n    91→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    92→  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n    93→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n    94→  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n    95→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    96→    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    97→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    98→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  return NextResponse.json({\n   102→    listing: {\n   103→      ...safeListingData,\n   104→      members,\n   105→      memberCount: members.length,\n   106→      isMember,\n   107→      isAuthor,\n   108→      hasApplied,\n   109→      applicationStatus,\n   110→      pendingApplicants,\n   111→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   112→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   113→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→\n   118→export async function PATCH(\n   119→  req: NextRequest,\n   120→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   121→) {\n   122→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   123→  if (!session) {\n   124→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  const { id } = await params;\n   128→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   129→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   130→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  const listing = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   135→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   136→\n   137→  if (!listing) {\n   138→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   143→  }\n   144→\n   145→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   146→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   147→    return NextResponse.json(\n   148→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   149→      { status: 400 }\n   150→    );\n   151→  }\n   152→\n   153→  try {\n   154→    const body = await req.json();\n   155→    const {\n   156→      language,\n   157→      readingPace,\n   158→      startDate,\n   159→      meetingFormat,\n   160→      maxGroupSize,\n   161→      requiresApproval,\n   162→      platformPreference,\n   163→    } = body;\n   164→\n   165→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   166→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   167→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→    }\n   169→\n   170→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   171→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   172→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   173→      }\n   174→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   175→      if (startDate < today) {\n   176→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→      }\n   178→    }\n   179→\n   180→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   181→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   182→    }\n   183→\n   184→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   185→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   186→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   187→      }\n   188→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   189→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   190→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   191→      }\n   192→\n   193→      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n   194→      const memberCount = (db\n   195→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   196→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   197→\n   198→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   199→        return NextResponse.json(\n   200→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   201→          { status: 400 }\n   202→        );\n   203→      }\n   204→    }\n   205→\n   206→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   207→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   211→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   212→    }\n   213→\n   214→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   215→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   216→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   217→\n   218→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(language);\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   227→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   228→      values.push(startDate);\n   229→    }\n   230→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   231→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   233→    }\n   234→    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n   235→    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n   236→    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n   237→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   238→      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   239→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   240→      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n   241→      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n   242→    }\n   243→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   244→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   245→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   246→    }\n   247→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   248→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   249→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   250→    }\n   251→\n   252→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   253→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   254→    }\n   255→\n   256→    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n   257→    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n   258→\n   259→    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n   260→    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n   261→    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   262→      // Re-check platform links inside the transaction to prevent TOCTOU race:\n   263→      // a concurrent POST to /telegram or /discord could set a link between the\n   264→      // outer guard (line 146) and this point\n   265→      const current = db\n   266→        .prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link, discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   267→        .get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null; discord_link: string | null } | undefined;\n   268→      if (current?.telegram_link || current?.discord_link) {\n   269→        return { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" };\n   270→      }\n   271→\n   272→      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n   273→      const txValues = [...values];\n   274→\n   275→      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n   276→        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n   277→        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n   278→        const currentMemberCount = (db\n   279→          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   280→          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   281→\n   282→        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n   283→          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n   284→        }\n   285→\n   286→        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n   287→          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n   288→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   289→          txValues.push(1);\n   290→        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n   291→          // Group has room now — reopen it\n   292→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   293→          txValues.push(0);\n   294→        }\n   295→      }\n   296→\n   297→      txValues.push(listingId);\n   298→      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n   299→\n   300→      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n   301→      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n   302→      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n   303→        db.prepare(\n   304→          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   305→        ).run(listingId);\n   306→      }\n   307→\n   308→      return null;\n   309→    });\n   310→\n   311→    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n   312→    if (txResult?.error) {\n   313→      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n   314→    }\n   315→\n   316→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   317→  } catch (error) {\n   318→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   319→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   320→  }\n   321→}\n   322→\n   323→export async function DELETE(\n   324→  _req: NextRequest,\n   325→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   326→) {\n   327→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   328→  if (!session) {\n   329→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   330→  }\n   331→\n   332→  const { id } = await params;\n   333→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   334→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   335→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   336→  }\n   337→\n   338→  const listing = db\n   339→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   340→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   341→\n   342→  if (!listing) {\n   343→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   344→  }\n   345→\n   346→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   347→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   348→  }\n   349→\n   350→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   351→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   352→    return NextResponse.json(\n   353→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   354→      { status: 400 }\n   355→    );\n   356→  }\n   357→\n   358→  try {\n   359→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   360→    const members = db\n   361→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   362→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   363→\n   364→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   365→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   366→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   367→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   368→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   369→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   370→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   371→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   372→    });\n   373→\n   374→    deleteTransaction();\n   375→\n   376→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   377→    for (const member of members) {\n   378→      try {\n   379→        createNotification(\n   380→          member.user_id,\n   381→          null,\n   382→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   383→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   384→        );\n   385→      } catch {\n   386→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   387→      }\n   388→    }\n   389→\n   390→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   391→  } catch (error) {\n   392→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   393→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   394→  }\n   395→}\n   396→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01S9SUwMjMpSrxpck3rDRHPZ","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"518c91a2-7b36-44aa-9187-7ac9b9d02351","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:18.926Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FjZ1x55Q3gnUym8QrtGSKA","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01S9SUwMjMpSrxpck3rDRHPZ","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"248d5bbe-5312-472e-9a8d-6185f6234161","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:18.944Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WY6xBCPg8W5DN84VPMGi2w","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    12→\n    13→/**\n    14→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    15→ *\n    16→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    17→ *\n    18→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    19→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    20→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    21→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    22→ *\n    23→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    24→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    25→ */\n    26→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    27→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    28→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    29→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    31→  }\n    32→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    33→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    38→  try {\n    39→    update = await req.json();\n    40→  } catch {\n    41→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    45→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    46→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    47→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    52→  if (update.message) {\n    53→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→\n    60→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    61→  chat: {\n    62→    id: number;\n    63→    title?: string;\n    64→    type: string;\n    65→  };\n    66→  from: {\n    67→    id: number;\n    68→    first_name: string;\n    69→  };\n    70→  new_chat_member: {\n    71→    user: {\n    72→      id: number;\n    73→      is_bot: boolean;\n    74→    };\n    75→    status: string;\n    76→  };\n    77→}\n    78→\n    79→interface TelegramMessage {\n    80→  chat: {\n    81→    id: number;\n    82→    type: string;\n    83→    title?: string;\n    84→  };\n    85→  text?: string;\n    86→  from?: {\n    87→    id: number;\n    88→  };\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    93→ *\n    94→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    95→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    96→ * 1. Creates the group\n    97→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    98→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    99→ *\n   100→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   101→ */\n   102→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   103→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   104→\n   105→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   106→  if (\n   107→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   108→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   109→  ) {\n   110→    return;\n   111→  }\n   112→\n   113→  // Only process group chats\n   114→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   115→    return;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   119→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   120→  const pending = db\n   121→    .prepare(\n   122→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   123→    )\n   124→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→\n   126→  if (pending) {\n   127→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   128→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   129→      chat.id\n   130→    );\n   131→    return;\n   132→  }\n   133→\n   134→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   135→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   136→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   137→  await sendMessage(\n   138→    chat.id,\n   139→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   140→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   141→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   142→  );\n   143→\n   144→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   145→  try {\n   146→    db.prepare(\n   147→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   148→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   149→  } catch {\n   150→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   151→  }\n   152→}\n   153→\n   154→/**\n   155→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   156→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   157→ */\n   158→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   159→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   160→    return;\n   161→  }\n   162→\n   163→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   164→\n   165→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   166→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   167→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   168→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   169→    if (listingId) {\n   170→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   171→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   172→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   173→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   174→        return;\n   175→      }\n   176→\n   177→      const linkedUser = db\n   178→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   179→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   180→\n   181→      if (linkedUser) {\n   182→        const listing = db\n   183→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   184→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   185→\n   186→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   187→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   188→          return;\n   189→        }\n   190→      }\n   191→\n   192→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   193→      await sendMessage(\n   194→        message.chat.id,\n   195→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   196→      );\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→  }\n   200→\n   201→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   202→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   203→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   204→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   205→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   206→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   207→      return;\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   211→    const linkedUser = db\n   212→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   213→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   214→\n   215→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   216→      await sendMessage(\n   217→        message.chat.id,\n   218→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   219→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   220→      );\n   221→      return;\n   222→    }\n   223→\n   224→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   225→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   226→      .prepare(\n   227→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   228→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   229→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   230→         AND author_id = ?\n   231→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   232→      )\n   233→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   234→\n   235→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   236→      await sendMessage(\n   237→        message.chat.id,\n   238→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   239→      );\n   240→      return;\n   241→    }\n   242→\n   243→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   244→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   245→      return;\n   246→    }\n   247→\n   248→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   249→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   250→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   251→    await sendMessage(\n   252→      message.chat.id,\n   253→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   254→    );\n   255→    return;\n   256→  }\n   257→\n   258→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   259→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   260→  if (linkMatch) {\n   261→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   262→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   263→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   264→      return;\n   265→    }\n   266→\n   267→    const linkedUser = db\n   268→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   269→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   270→\n   271→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   272→      await sendMessage(\n   273→        message.chat.id,\n   274→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   275→      );\n   276→      return;\n   277→    }\n   278→\n   279→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   280→\n   281→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   282→    const listing = db\n   283→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   284→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   285→\n   286→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   287→      await sendMessage(\n   288→        message.chat.id,\n   289→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   290→      );\n   291→      return;\n   292→    }\n   293→\n   294→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   295→      await sendMessage(\n   296→        message.chat.id,\n   297→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   298→      );\n   299→      return;\n   300→    }\n   301→\n   302→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   303→  }\n   304→}\n   305→\n   306→/**\n   307→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   308→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   309→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   310→ * 3. Notify all members\n   311→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   312→ */\n   313→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   314→  const listing = db\n   315→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   316→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   317→\n   318→  if (!listing) {\n   319→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   320→    return;\n   321→  }\n   322→\n   323→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   324→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   325→    return;\n   326→  }\n   327→\n   328→  // Try to create an invite link\n   329→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   330→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   331→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   332→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   333→  }\n   334→\n   335→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   336→    await sendMessage(\n   337→      chatId,\n   338→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   339→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   340→    );\n   341→    return;\n   342→  }\n   343→\n   344→  // Save to database\n   345→  db.prepare(\n   346→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   347→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   348→\n   349→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   350→  const members = db\n   351→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   352→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   353→\n   354→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   355→  for (const member of members) {\n   356→    createNotification(\n   357→      member.user_id,\n   358→      listingId,\n   359→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   360→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   361→    );\n   362→  }\n   363→\n   364→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   365→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   366→  await sendMessage(\n   367→    chatId,\n   368→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   369→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   370→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   371→  );\n   372→}\n   373→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01S9SUwMjMpSrxpck3rDRHPZ","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"70588051-667b-4ccf-bc17-52d121f80807","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:19.340Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01An3RiHEycw6rU7f4wSKbxg","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G9aHTAHXBeuY29WEP9wq9v","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6044,"cache_read_input_tokens":11527,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6044,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":39,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"d415afd5-8ba3-457a-ba59-bd063f398163"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01G9aHTAHXBeuY29WEP9wq9v","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n    22→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    23→  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n    24→\n    25→  if (!includePast) {\n    26→    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    27→    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    28→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    29→    params.push(effectiveDate);\n    30→  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    31→    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    37→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    38→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    42→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    43→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    47→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    48→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    52→\n    53→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    54→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    55→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    56→\n    57→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    58→\n    59→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    60→  const countResult = db\n    61→    .prepare(\n    62→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    63→    )\n    64→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    65→\n    66→  const listings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT\n    69→        l.*,\n    70→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    71→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    72→      FROM listings l\n    73→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    74→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    75→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    76→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    77→    )\n    78→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    79→\n    80→  return NextResponse.json({\n    81→    listings,\n    82→    pagination: {\n    83→      page,\n    84→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    85→      total: countResult.total,\n    86→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    87→    },\n    88→  });\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"8269e12e-bb89-4882-8c29-cd28c2ce80e3","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:20.087Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01An3RiHEycw6rU7f4wSKbxg","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DKDaicFXqWVZLeF9LSZNJu","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6044,"cache_read_input_tokens":11527,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6044,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":39,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"7dfd4fa6-3011-4d7b-a8e1-4d77ad37ce68"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DKDaicFXqWVZLeF9LSZNJu","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n    77→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    78→  if (isAuthor) {\n    79→    pendingApplicants = db\n    80→      .prepare(\n    81→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    82→         FROM listing_applications la\n    83→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    84→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    85→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    86→      )\n    87→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n    91→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    92→  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n    93→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n    94→  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n    95→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    96→    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    97→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    98→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  return NextResponse.json({\n   102→    listing: {\n   103→      ...safeListingData,\n   104→      members,\n   105→      memberCount: members.length,\n   106→      isMember,\n   107→      isAuthor,\n   108→      hasApplied,\n   109→      applicationStatus,\n   110→      pendingApplicants,\n   111→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   112→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   113→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→\n   118→export async function PATCH(\n   119→  req: NextRequest,\n   120→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   121→) {\n   122→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   123→  if (!session) {\n   124→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  const { id } = await params;\n   128→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   129→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   130→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  const listing = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   135→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   136→\n   137→  if (!listing) {\n   138→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   143→  }\n   144→\n   145→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   146→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   147→    return NextResponse.json(\n   148→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   149→      { status: 400 }\n   150→    );\n   151→  }\n   152→\n   153→  try {\n   154→    const body = await req.json();\n   155→    const {\n   156→      language,\n   157→      readingPace,\n   158→      startDate,\n   159→      meetingFormat,\n   160→      maxGroupSize,\n   161→      requiresApproval,\n   162→      platformPreference,\n   163→    } = body;\n   164→\n   165→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   166→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   167→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→    }\n   169→\n   170→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   171→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   172→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   173→      }\n   174→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   175→      if (startDate < today) {\n   176→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→      }\n   178→    }\n   179→\n   180→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   181→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   182→    }\n   183→\n   184→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   185→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   186→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   187→      }\n   188→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   189→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   190→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   191→      }\n   192→\n   193→      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n   194→      const memberCount = (db\n   195→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   196→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   197→\n   198→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   199→        return NextResponse.json(\n   200→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   201→          { status: 400 }\n   202→        );\n   203→      }\n   204→    }\n   205→\n   206→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   207→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   211→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   212→    }\n   213→\n   214→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   215→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   216→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   217→\n   218→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(language);\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   227→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   228→      values.push(startDate);\n   229→    }\n   230→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   231→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   233→    }\n   234→    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n   235→    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n   236→    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n   237→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   238→      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   239→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   240→      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n   241→      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n   242→    }\n   243→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   244→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   245→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   246→    }\n   247→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   248→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   249→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   250→    }\n   251→\n   252→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   253→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   254→    }\n   255→\n   256→    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n   257→    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n   258→\n   259→    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n   260→    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n   261→    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   262→      // Re-check platform links inside the transaction to prevent TOCTOU race:\n   263→      // a concurrent POST to /telegram or /discord could set a link between the\n   264→      // outer guard (line 146) and this point\n   265→      const current = db\n   266→        .prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link, discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   267→        .get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null; discord_link: string | null } | undefined;\n   268→      if (current?.telegram_link || current?.discord_link) {\n   269→        return { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" };\n   270→      }\n   271→\n   272→      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n   273→      const txValues = [...values];\n   274→\n   275→      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n   276→        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n   277→        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n   278→        const currentMemberCount = (db\n   279→          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   280→          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   281→\n   282→        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n   283→          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n   284→        }\n   285→\n   286→        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n   287→          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n   288→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   289→          txValues.push(1);\n   290→        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n   291→          // Group has room now — reopen it\n   292→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   293→          txValues.push(0);\n   294→        }\n   295→      }\n   296→\n   297→      txValues.push(listingId);\n   298→      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n   299→\n   300→      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n   301→      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n   302→      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n   303→        db.prepare(\n   304→          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   305→        ).run(listingId);\n   306→      }\n   307→\n   308→      return null;\n   309→    });\n   310→\n   311→    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n   312→    if (txResult?.error) {\n   313→      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n   314→    }\n   315→\n   316→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   317→  } catch (error) {\n   318→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   319→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   320→  }\n   321→}\n   322→\n   323→export async function DELETE(\n   324→  _req: NextRequest,\n   325→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   326→) {\n   327→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   328→  if (!session) {\n   329→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   330→  }\n   331→\n   332→  const { id } = await params;\n   333→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   334→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   335→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   336→  }\n   337→\n   338→  const listing = db\n   339→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   340→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   341→\n   342→  if (!listing) {\n   343→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   344→  }\n   345→\n   346→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   347→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   348→  }\n   349→\n   350→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   351→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   352→    return NextResponse.json(\n   353→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   354→      { status: 400 }\n   355→    );\n   356→  }\n   357→\n   358→  try {\n   359→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   360→    const members = db\n   361→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   362→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   363→\n   364→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   365→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   366→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   367→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   368→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   369→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   370→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   371→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   372→    });\n   373→\n   374→    deleteTransaction();\n   375→\n   376→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   377→    for (const member of members) {\n   378→      try {\n   379→        createNotification(\n   380→          member.user_id,\n   381→          null,\n   382→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   383→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   384→        );\n   385→      } catch {\n   386→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   387→      }\n   388→    }\n   389→\n   390→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   391→  } catch (error) {\n   392→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   393→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   394→  }\n   395→}\n   396→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"d25a68f4-b21d-4d9c-900f-9cf846529c21","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:20.737Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01V3HsAF8uAhy5czdTuVdTQy","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses\n    46→    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||\n    47→        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||\n    48→        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {\n    49→      return NextResponse.json(\n    50→        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },\n    51→        { status: 400 }\n    52→      );\n    53→    }\n    54→\n    55→    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n    56→      return NextResponse.json(\n    57→        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },\n    58→        { status: 400 }\n    59→      );\n    60→    }\n    61→\n    62→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    63→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n    64→      return NextResponse.json(\n    65→        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n    66→        { status: 400 }\n    67→      );\n    68→    }\n    69→\n    70→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    71→      return NextResponse.json(\n    72→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    73→        { status: 400 }\n    74→      );\n    75→    }\n    76→\n    77→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    78→      return NextResponse.json(\n    79→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    80→        { status: 400 }\n    81→      );\n    82→    }\n    83→\n    84→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    85→    if (startDate < today) {\n    86→      return NextResponse.json(\n    87→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    88→        { status: 400 }\n    89→      );\n    90→    }\n    91→\n    92→    const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n    93→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    94→      return NextResponse.json(\n    95→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    96→        { status: 400 }\n    97→      );\n    98→    }\n    99→\n   100→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n   101→      ? platformPreference\n   102→      : \"telegram\";\n   103→\n   104→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n   105→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n   106→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n   107→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n   108→        ? bookCoverUrl\n   109→        : \"\";\n   110→\n   111→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n   112→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   113→      const result = db\n   114→        .prepare(\n   115→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n   116→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   117→        )\n   118→        .run(\n   119→          session.userId,\n   120→          bookTitle.trim(),\n   121→          bookAuthor.trim(),\n   122→          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n   123→          bookOlid || \"\",\n   124→          language || \"English\",\n   125→          readingPace.trim(),\n   126→          startDate,\n   127→          meetingFormat,\n   128→          size,\n   129→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   130→          platform\n   131→        );\n   132→\n   133→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   134→      db.prepare(\n   135→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   136→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   137→\n   138→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   139→    });\n   140→\n   141→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   142→\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { id: listingId },\n   145→      { status: 201 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  } catch (error) {\n   148→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   149→    return NextResponse.json(\n   150→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   151→      { status: 500 }\n   152→    );\n   153→  }\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"a5b388f1-a1b8-43b6-aed8-a3b79b31a3b1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:20.869Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PYZd7XK64sZAxdsKC77D2v","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\n     2→import path from \"path\";\n     3→import fs from \"fs\";\n     4→\n     5→const DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\n     6→const DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n     7→\n     8→// Ensure data directory exists\n     9→if (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n    10→  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→const db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n    14→\n    15→// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\n    16→db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n    17→db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n    18→\n    19→// Initialize schema\n    20→db.exec(`\n    21→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    22→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    23→    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    24→    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    25→    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    26→    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    27→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    28→  );\n    29→\n    30→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    31→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    32→    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    33→    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    34→    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    35→    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    37→    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    38→    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    39→    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    40→    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    41→    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    42→    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    43→    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    44→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    45→    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    46→  );\n    47→\n    48→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    49→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    50→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    52→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    53→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    54→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    55→  );\n    56→\n    57→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    58→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    59→    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    60→    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    61→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    62→  );\n    63→\n    64→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    65→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    66→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    67→    listing_id INTEGER,\n    68→    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    69→    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    70→    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    71→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    72→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    73→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    74→  );\n    75→\n    76→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    77→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    78→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    79→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    80→    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n    81→      CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    82→    message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    83→    applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    84→    decided_at TEXT,\n    85→    UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    86→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    87→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    88→  );\n    89→`);\n    90→\n    91→// Idempotent migration: add requires_approval column\n    92→try {\n    93→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0\");\n    94→} catch {\n    95→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n    96→}\n    97→\n    98→// Idempotent migration: add platform_preference column\n    99→try {\n   100→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'\");\n   101→} catch {\n   102→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   103→}\n   104→\n   105→// Idempotent migration: add discord_link column\n   106→try {\n   107→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_link TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   108→} catch {\n   109→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   110→}\n   111→\n   112→// Idempotent migration: add discord_channel_id column\n   113→try {\n   114→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   115→} catch {\n   116→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→// Idempotent migration: add telegram_chat_id column for auto-telegram feature\n   120→try {\n   121→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n   122→} catch {\n   123→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   124→}\n   125→\n   126→// Tables for Telegram bot integration\n   127→db.exec(`\n   128→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n   129→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   130→    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   131→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   132→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n   133→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n   134→  );\n   135→\n   136→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n   137→    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n   138→    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   139→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n   140→  );\n   141→\n   142→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n   143→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   144→    telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   145→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   146→    PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n   147→    UNIQUE (telegram_user_id),\n   148→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n   149→  );\n   150→`);\n   151→\n   152→// Rating and Reputation system\n   153→db.exec(`\n   154→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n   155→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n   156→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   157→    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   158→    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   159→    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n   160→    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   161→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   162→    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n   163→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n   164→    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n   165→    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n   166→  );\n   167→`);\n   168→\n   169→// Performance indexes on high-frequency foreign key columns\n   170→db.exec(`\n   171→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_members_user_id ON listing_members(user_id);\n   172→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications(user_id);\n   173→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ratings_rated_user_id ON ratings(rated_user_id);\n   174→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listings_author_id ON listings(author_id);\n   175→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);\n   176→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n   177→  CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pending_telegram_chat_id ON pending_telegram_groups(telegram_chat_id);\n   178→`);\n   179→\n   180→export default db;\n   181→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01S9SUwMjMpSrxpck3rDRHPZ","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"309ea3b1-0e7f-4159-9b6d-91c99a505f3e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:21.995Z"}
