{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Pkcq88tSWKVrYeCdQcZ7K2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01E9btX43T6XfvYeQJtpjQUt","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8924,"cache_read_input_tokens":17571,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8924,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"d7be6245-8b7f-4748-9101-a1225e5c9bcd"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01E9btX43T6XfvYeQJtpjQUt","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    72→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    73→    const freshListing = db\n    74→      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→    if (!freshListing) {\n    78→      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    79→    }\n    80→\n    81→    const { count } = db\n    82→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    83→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    84→\n    85→    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    86→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    db.prepare(\n    90→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    91→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    92→\n    93→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    94→    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    95→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    96→    }\n    97→\n    98→    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    99→  });\n   100→\n   101→  const result = joinTransaction();\n   102→\n   103→  if (result.error) {\n   104→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n   105→  }\n   106→\n   107→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   108→  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n   109→  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n   110→  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n   111→    notifyGroupFull(\n   112→      listingId,\n   113→      listing.book_title as string,\n   114→      listing.platform_preference as string\n   115→    );\n   116→  } else {\n   117→    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   118→  }\n   119→\n   120→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   121→}\n   122→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"08e3a062-9ac9-48a9-b3c1-8ed4fa1e3a6d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:23.770Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"ae63ab08b24daf7ae","tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","description":"Reading app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":26892,"tool_uses":11,"duration_ms":13648},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"2de534e1-f6d1-403f-a110-ac472c2fc779","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Pkcq88tSWKVrYeCdQcZ7K2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01F5jooDCSwh7ERAhxVrgknv","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8924,"cache_read_input_tokens":17571,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8924,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"09208763-87bc-42aa-bfe8-737b7d0ad5ac"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01F5jooDCSwh7ERAhxVrgknv","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n    48→  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    49→    // Check if already a member\n    50→    const isMember = db\n    51→      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    52→      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    53→\n    54→    if (isMember) {\n    55→      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    59→    const currentListing = db\n    60→      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    61→      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n    62→\n    63→    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n    64→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    68→    const existingApp = db\n    69→      .prepare(\n    70→        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    71→      )\n    72→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→    if (existingApp) {\n    75→      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    76→        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n    77→      }\n    78→      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    79→        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n    80→      }\n    81→      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    82→      db.prepare(\n    83→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    84→      ).run(existingApp.id);\n    85→\n    86→      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    // Insert new application\n    90→    db.prepare(\n    91→      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    92→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    93→\n    94→    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"c607962e-4c7c-439a-a9bb-c17369215e77","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:24.185Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"ae63ab08b24daf7ae","tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","description":"Reading app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":26928,"tool_uses":12,"duration_ms":13809},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"75f33f1f-8c17-4754-8e7e-26509b6639cf","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Pkcq88tSWKVrYeCdQcZ7K2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01XXuCRJdJx9cqTZ3S4Lp481","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8924,"cache_read_input_tokens":17571,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8924,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"d6b7e327-3cfb-4f82-b484-561ae33d87af"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XXuCRJdJx9cqTZ3S4Lp481","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    63→      const freshListing = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    66→\n    67→      if (!freshListing) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Check if group is already full\n    72→      const { count } = db\n    73→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    74→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    75→\n    76→      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    77→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    78→      }\n    79→\n    80→      // Update application status\n    81→      db.prepare(\n    82→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    83→      ).run(applicationId);\n    84→\n    85→      // Add to members\n    86→      db.prepare(\n    87→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    88→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    89→\n    90→      // Check if group is now full\n    91→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    92→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    93→      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    94→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    95→\n    96→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    97→        rejectedApps = db\n    98→          .prepare(\n    99→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   100→          )\n   101→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n   102→\n   103→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n   104→          db.prepare(\n   105→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   106→          ).run(app.id);\n   107→        }\n   108→\n   109→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   110→      }\n   111→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   112→    });\n   113→\n   114→    try {\n   115→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   116→\n   117→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   118→      try {\n   119→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   120→\n   121→        if (result.isFull) {\n   122→          notifyGroupFull(\n   123→            listingId,\n   124→            listing.book_title as string,\n   125→            listing.platform_preference as string\n   126→          );\n   127→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   128→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   129→          }\n   130→        }\n   131→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   132→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   133→      }\n   134→\n   135→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   136→    } catch (err) {\n   137→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   138→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   139→    }\n   140→  } else {\n   141→    // Reject\n   142→    db.prepare(\n   143→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   144→    ).run(applicationId);\n   145→\n   146→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   147→\n   148→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   149→  }\n   150→}\n   151→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"47611ca1-4fbc-4014-a52e-3079cc374fe3","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:24.344Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0123A3DrVoQtJunzoX7MhdRf","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"c8ab372d-de96-4d6c-bc20-7daeb2ee8393","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:27.140Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013CHhDpE8KEZFVBX45HaKvP","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  // Type-check before string operations to prevent TypeError on non-string input\n    14→  if (typeof displayName !== \"string\") {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→  if (bio !== undefined && typeof bio !== \"string\") {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    34→    displayName.trim(),\n    35→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    36→    session.userId\n    37→  );\n    38→\n    39→  // Update session\n    40→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    41→  await session.save();\n    42→\n    43→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    44→}\n    45→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"077ea5e9-9018-43bb-85e3-e50fc85be229","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:27.951Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Pg9J1uhAaHo7tmNXiRpg9Y","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment !== undefined && comment !== null && typeof comment !== \"string\") {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be a string\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (comment && typeof comment === \"string\" && comment.length > 1000) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    80→  const listing = db\n    81→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    82→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    87→      { status: 404 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    92→    return NextResponse.json(\n    93→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    94→      { status: 400 }\n    95→    );\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Verify both users are members\n    99→  const raterMember = db\n   100→    .prepare(\n   101→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   102→    )\n   103→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   104→\n   105→  if (!raterMember) {\n   106→    return NextResponse.json(\n   107→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   108→      { status: 403 }\n   109→    );\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  const ratedMember = db\n   113→    .prepare(\n   114→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   115→    )\n   116→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   117→\n   118→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json(\n   120→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   121→      { status: 400 }\n   122→    );\n   123→  }\n   124→\n   125→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   126→  const existing = db\n   127→    .prepare(\n   128→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   129→    )\n   130→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (existing) {\n   133→    db.prepare(\n   134→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   135→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   136→  } else {\n   137→    db.prepare(\n   138→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   139→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   140→\n   141→    // Notify the rated user\n   142→    createNotification(\n   143→      ratedUserId,\n   144→      listingId,\n   145→      \"rating_received\",\n   146→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   151→}\n   152→\n   153→/**\n   154→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   155→ *\n   156→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   157→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   158→ */\n   159→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   160→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   161→  if (!session) {\n   162→    return NextResponse.json(\n   163→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   164→      { status: 401 }\n   165→    );\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   169→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   176→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   177→    return NextResponse.json(\n   178→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   179→      { status: 400 }\n   180→    );\n   181→  }\n   182→\n   183→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   184→  const isMember = db\n   185→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   186→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   187→  if (!isMember) {\n   188→    return NextResponse.json(\n   189→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   190→      { status: 403 }\n   191→    );\n   192→  }\n   193→\n   194→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   195→  const givenRatings = db\n   196→    .prepare(\n   197→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   198→       FROM ratings r\n   199→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   200→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   201→    )\n   202→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   203→      rated_user_id: number;\n   204→      score: number;\n   205→      comment: string;\n   206→      display_name: string;\n   207→    }[];\n   208→\n   209→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   210→  const receivedRatings = db\n   211→    .prepare(\n   212→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   213→       FROM ratings r\n   214→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   215→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   216→    )\n   217→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   218→      rater_id: number;\n   219→      score: number;\n   220→      comment: string;\n   221→      display_name: string;\n   222→    }[];\n   223→\n   224→  return NextResponse.json({\n   225→    givenRatings,\n   226→    receivedRatings,\n   227→  });\n   228→}\n   229→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"ad6f63c0-0fbb-4ffa-976a-5a3630add561","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:27.987Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0114BfXJsb3i9WPkuJx7BWMg","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    12→\n    13→/**\n    14→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    15→ *\n    16→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    17→ *\n    18→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    19→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    20→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    21→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    22→ *\n    23→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    24→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    25→ */\n    26→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    27→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    28→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    29→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    31→  }\n    32→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    33→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    38→  try {\n    39→    update = await req.json();\n    40→  } catch {\n    41→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    45→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    46→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    47→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    52→  if (update.message) {\n    53→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→\n    60→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    61→  chat: {\n    62→    id: number;\n    63→    title?: string;\n    64→    type: string;\n    65→  };\n    66→  from: {\n    67→    id: number;\n    68→    first_name: string;\n    69→  };\n    70→  new_chat_member: {\n    71→    user: {\n    72→      id: number;\n    73→      is_bot: boolean;\n    74→    };\n    75→    status: string;\n    76→  };\n    77→}\n    78→\n    79→interface TelegramMessage {\n    80→  chat: {\n    81→    id: number;\n    82→    type: string;\n    83→    title?: string;\n    84→  };\n    85→  text?: string;\n    86→  from?: {\n    87→    id: number;\n    88→  };\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    93→ *\n    94→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    95→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    96→ * 1. Creates the group\n    97→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    98→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    99→ *\n   100→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   101→ */\n   102→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   103→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   104→\n   105→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   106→  if (\n   107→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   108→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   109→  ) {\n   110→    return;\n   111→  }\n   112→\n   113→  // Only process group chats\n   114→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   115→    return;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   119→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   120→  const pending = db\n   121→    .prepare(\n   122→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   123→    )\n   124→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→\n   126→  if (pending) {\n   127→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   128→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   129→      chat.id\n   130→    );\n   131→    return;\n   132→  }\n   133→\n   134→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   135→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   136→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   137→  await sendMessage(\n   138→    chat.id,\n   139→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   140→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   141→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   142→  );\n   143→\n   144→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   145→  try {\n   146→    db.prepare(\n   147→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   148→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   149→  } catch {\n   150→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   151→  }\n   152→}\n   153→\n   154→/**\n   155→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   156→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   157→ */\n   158→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   159→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   160→    return;\n   161→  }\n   162→\n   163→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   164→\n   165→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   166→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   167→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   168→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   169→    if (listingId) {\n   170→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   171→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   172→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   173→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   174→        return;\n   175→      }\n   176→\n   177→      const linkedUser = db\n   178→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   179→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   180→\n   181→      if (linkedUser) {\n   182→        const listing = db\n   183→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   184→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   185→\n   186→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   187→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   188→          return;\n   189→        }\n   190→      }\n   191→\n   192→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   193→      await sendMessage(\n   194→        message.chat.id,\n   195→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   196→      );\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→  }\n   200→\n   201→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   202→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   203→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   204→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   205→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   206→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   207→      return;\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   211→    const linkedUser = db\n   212→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   213→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   214→\n   215→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   216→      await sendMessage(\n   217→        message.chat.id,\n   218→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   219→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   220→      );\n   221→      return;\n   222→    }\n   223→\n   224→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   225→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   226→      .prepare(\n   227→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   228→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   229→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   230→         AND author_id = ?\n   231→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   232→      )\n   233→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   234→\n   235→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   236→      await sendMessage(\n   237→        message.chat.id,\n   238→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   239→      );\n   240→      return;\n   241→    }\n   242→\n   243→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   244→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   245→      return;\n   246→    }\n   247→\n   248→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   249→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   250→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   251→    await sendMessage(\n   252→      message.chat.id,\n   253→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   254→    );\n   255→    return;\n   256→  }\n   257→\n   258→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   259→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   260→  if (linkMatch) {\n   261→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   262→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   263→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   264→      return;\n   265→    }\n   266→\n   267→    const linkedUser = db\n   268→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   269→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   270→\n   271→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   272→      await sendMessage(\n   273→        message.chat.id,\n   274→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   275→      );\n   276→      return;\n   277→    }\n   278→\n   279→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   280→\n   281→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   282→    const listing = db\n   283→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   284→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   285→\n   286→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   287→      await sendMessage(\n   288→        message.chat.id,\n   289→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   290→      );\n   291→      return;\n   292→    }\n   293→\n   294→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   295→      await sendMessage(\n   296→        message.chat.id,\n   297→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   298→      );\n   299→      return;\n   300→    }\n   301→\n   302→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   303→  }\n   304→}\n   305→\n   306→/**\n   307→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   308→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   309→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   310→ * 3. Notify all members\n   311→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   312→ */\n   313→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   314→  const listing = db\n   315→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   316→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   317→\n   318→  if (!listing) {\n   319→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   320→    return;\n   321→  }\n   322→\n   323→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   324→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   325→    return;\n   326→  }\n   327→\n   328→  // Try to create an invite link\n   329→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   330→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   331→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   332→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   333→  }\n   334→\n   335→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   336→    await sendMessage(\n   337→      chatId,\n   338→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   339→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   340→    );\n   341→    return;\n   342→  }\n   343→\n   344→  // Save to database\n   345→  db.prepare(\n   346→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   347→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   348→\n   349→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   350→  const members = db\n   351→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   352→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   353→\n   354→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   355→  for (const member of members) {\n   356→    createNotification(\n   357→      member.user_id,\n   358→      listingId,\n   359→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   360→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   361→    );\n   362→  }\n   363→\n   364→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   365→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   366→  await sendMessage(\n   367→    chatId,\n   368→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   369→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   370→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   371→  );\n   372→}\n   373→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"7013c82d-f7bd-40ef-a4af-e07519a9c3a5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:31.259Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01CTs8e1qWQwvBtKMTny5rQm","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01U4fkvEuhiHQmGNqjm1riC5","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4292,"cache_read_input_tokens":31625,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4292,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"efc618a5-e51f-4ee8-a978-90ed27d8c3f7"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01U4fkvEuhiHQmGNqjm1riC5","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→  isValidSnowflake,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * This endpoint handles:\n    16→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    17→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    18→ *\n    19→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    20→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    21→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    22→ */\n    23→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    24→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    25→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    26→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    28→  }\n    29→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    30→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  try {\n    35→    const body = await req.json();\n    36→    const { type } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    39→      return handleLink(body);\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    43→    if (type === 1) {\n    44→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    46→    }\n    47→\n    48→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    49→  } catch (err) {\n    50→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→async function handleLink(body: {\n    59→  guildId: string;\n    60→  listingId: number;\n    61→  channelId?: string;\n    62→}) {\n    63→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    64→\n    65→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n    80→  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    81→    return NextResponse.json(\n    82→      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n    83→      { status: 400 }\n    84→    );\n    85→  }\n    86→  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    87→    return NextResponse.json(\n    88→      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n    89→      { status: 400 }\n    90→    );\n    91→  }\n    92→\n    93→  const listing = db\n    94→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    95→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    96→\n    97→  if (!listing) {\n    98→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n   102→    return NextResponse.json(\n   103→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n   104→      { status: 400 }\n   105→    );\n   106→  }\n   107→\n   108→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n   109→    return NextResponse.json(\n   110→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n   111→      { status: 400 }\n   112→    );\n   113→  }\n   114→\n   115→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n   116→\n   117→  // If no channel specified, create one\n   118→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n   119→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n   120→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n   121→      .toLowerCase()\n   122→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   123→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   124→\n   125→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   126→      guildId,\n   127→      channelName,\n   128→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   129→    );\n   130→\n   131→    if (!channel) {\n   132→      return NextResponse.json(\n   133→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   134→        { status: 500 }\n   135→      );\n   136→    }\n   137→\n   138→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  // Create invite link\n   142→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   143→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   144→    return NextResponse.json(\n   145→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   146→      { status: 500 }\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  // Save to DB\n   151→  db.prepare(\n   152→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   153→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   154→\n   155→  // Notify all members\n   156→  const members = db\n   157→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   158→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   159→\n   160→  for (const member of members) {\n   161→    createNotification(\n   162→      member.user_id,\n   163→      listingId,\n   164→      \"discord_ready\",\n   165→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→\n   169→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   170→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   171→    targetChannelId,\n   172→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   173→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   174→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   175→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   176→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   177→  );\n   178→\n   179→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   180→}\n   181→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"b7139be6-3a72-4959-8c5b-2e5463bf98ff","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:31.382Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01CTs8e1qWQwvBtKMTny5rQm","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01EmfLsdtQGk5BNTdi8S2J42","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4292,"cache_read_input_tokens":31625,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4292,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"66d40e93-ddf5-428d-b2ef-c92aeec4c814"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EmfLsdtQGk5BNTdi8S2J42","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n     6→ * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n     7→ * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n    11→ * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n    12→ * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n    13→ * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→/**\n    17→ * Read bot token live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n    18→ * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n    19→ * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n    20→ */\n    21→function getBotToken(): string {\n    22→  return process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    23→}\n    24→\n    25→function getTelegramApi(): string {\n    26→  return `https://api.telegram.org/bot${getBotToken()}`;\n    27→}\n    28→\n    29→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    30→  return getBotToken().length > 0;\n    31→}\n    32→\n    33→/**\n    34→ * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n    35→ */\n    36→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    37→  method: string,\n    38→  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n    39→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n    40→  const res = await fetch(`${getTelegramApi()}/${method}`, {\n    41→    method: \"POST\",\n    42→    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    43→    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n    44→  });\n    45→  return res.json();\n    46→}\n    47→\n    48→/**\n    49→ * Get bot info (username, id).\n    50→ */\n    51→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    52→  id: number;\n    53→  username: string;\n    54→  first_name: string;\n    55→} | null> {\n    56→  const res = await callApi<{\n    57→    id: number;\n    58→    username: string;\n    59→    first_name: string;\n    60→  }>(\"getMe\");\n    61→  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n    66→ * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n    67→ *\n    68→ * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n    69→ *\n    70→ * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n    71→ * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n    72→ */\n    73→export async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n    74→  listingId: number\n    75→): Promise<string | null> {\n    76→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    77→  if (!bot) return null;\n    78→  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n    79→}\n    80→\n    81→/**\n    82→ * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n    83→ */\n    84→export async function createChatInviteLink(\n    85→  chatId: number | string\n    86→): Promise<string | null> {\n    87→  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    88→    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    89→    {\n    90→      chat_id: chatId,\n    91→      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n    92→      creates_join_request: false,\n    93→    }\n    94→  );\n    95→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    96→    return res.result.invite_link;\n    97→  }\n    98→  return null;\n    99→}\n   100→\n   101→/**\n   102→ * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n   103→ */\n   104→export async function exportChatInviteLink(\n   105→  chatId: number | string\n   106→): Promise<string | null> {\n   107→  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n   108→    chat_id: chatId,\n   109→  });\n   110→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n   111→    return res.result;\n   112→  }\n   113→  return null;\n   114→}\n   115→\n   116→/**\n   117→ * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n   118→ * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n   119→ * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n   120→ */\n   121→export function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n   122→  return text\n   123→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n   124→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n   125→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n   126→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n   127→}\n   128→\n   129→/**\n   130→ * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n   131→ */\n   132→export async function sendMessage(\n   133→  chatId: number | string,\n   134→  text: string\n   135→): Promise<boolean> {\n   136→  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n   137→    chat_id: chatId,\n   138→    text,\n   139→    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n   140→  });\n   141→  return res.ok;\n   142→}\n   143→\n   144→/**\n   145→ * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n   146→ */\n   147→export async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   148→  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n   149→    url,\n   150→    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n   151→  });\n   152→  return res.ok;\n   153→}\n   154→\n   155→/**\n   156→ * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n   157→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   158→ */\n   159→export function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n   160→  payload: string\n   161→): number | null {\n   162→  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   163→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   164→}\n   165→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"78875740-8801-43c5-ad1b-fc19fca2552a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:31.708Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Vm2DFaWtFZbNqLCTrTXY5C","type":"tool_result","content":"    20→db.exec(`\n    21→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    22→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    23→    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    24→    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    25→    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    26→    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    27→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    28→  );\n    29→\n    30→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    31→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    32→    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    33→    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    34→    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    35→    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    37→    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    38→    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    39→    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    40→    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    41→    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    42→    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    43→    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    44→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    45→    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    46→  );\n    47→\n    48→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    49→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    50→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    52→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    53→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    54→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    55→  );\n    56→\n    57→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    58→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    59→    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    60→    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    61→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    62→  );\n    63→\n    64→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    65→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    66→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    67→    listing_id INTEGER,\n    68→    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    69→    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    70→    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    71→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    72→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    73→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    74→  );\n    75→\n    76→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    77→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    78→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    79→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    80→    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n    81→      CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    82→    message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    83→    applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    84→    decided_at TEXT,\n    85→    UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    86→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    87→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    88→  );\n    89→`);\n    90→\n    91→// Idempotent migration: add requires_approval column\n    92→try {\n    93→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0\");\n    94→} catch {\n    95→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n    96→}\n    97→\n    98→// Idempotent migration: add platform_preference column\n    99→try {\n   100→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'\");\n   101→} catch {\n   102→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   103→}\n   104→\n   105→// Idempotent migration: add discord_link column\n   106→try {\n   107→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_link TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   108→} catch {\n   109→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   110→}\n   111→\n   112→// Idempotent migration: add discord_channel_id column\n   113→try {\n   114→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   115→} catch {\n   116→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→// Idempotent migration: add telegram_chat_id column for auto-telegram feature\n   120→try {\n   121→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n   122→} catch {\n   123→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   124→}\n   125→\n   126→// Tables for Telegram bot integration\n   127→db.exec(`\n   128→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n   129→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   130→    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   131→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   132→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n   133→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n   134→  );\n   135→\n   136→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n   137→    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n   138→    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   139→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n   140→  );\n   141→\n   142→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n   143→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   144→    telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   145→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   146→    PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n   147→    UNIQUE (telegram_user_id),\n   148→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n   149→  );\n   150→`);\n   151→\n   152→// Rating and Reputation system\n   153→db.exec(`\n   154→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n   155→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n   156→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   157→    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   158→    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   159→    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n   160→    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   161→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   162→    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n   163→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n   164→    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n   165→    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n   166→  );\n   167→`);\n   168→\n   169→// Performance indexes on high-frequency foreign key columns\n   170→db.exec(`\n   171→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_members_user_id ON listing_members(user_id);\n   172→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications(user_id);\n   173→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ratings_rated_user_id ON ratings(rated_user_id);\n   174→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listings_author_id ON listings(author_id);\n   175→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);\n   176→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n   177→  CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pending_telegram_chat_id ON pending_telegram_groups(telegram_chat_id);\n   178→`);\n   179→\n   180→export default db;\n   181→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01S9SUwMjMpSrxpck3rDRHPZ","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"64c5a08f-bf66-49bf-8527-873152b88713","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:32.769Z"}
