{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GnNKG8vUMedGYStFWbfoY4","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Listing {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  book_title: string;\n    10→  book_author: string;\n    11→  book_cover_url: string;\n    12→  language: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  requires_approval: number;\n    18→  platform_preference: string;\n    19→  member_count: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  created_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→export default function HomePage() {\n    25→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    26→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    27→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    28→\n    29→  // Search & filter state\n    30→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    34→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    35→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    36→\n    37→  // Pagination state\n    38→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n    39→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n    40→  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n    41→\n    42→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    43→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    44→\n    45→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    46→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n    47→      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n    48→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    49→      const controller = new AbortController();\n    50→      abortRef.current = controller;\n    51→\n    52→      setLoading(true);\n    53→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    54→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    55→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    56→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    57→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    58→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    59→      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n    60→\n    61→      const qs = params.toString();\n    62→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n    63→        .then((r) => {\n    64→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    65→          return r.json();\n    66→        })\n    67→        .then((data) => {\n    68→          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n    69→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    70→          if (data.pagination) {\n    71→            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n    72→            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n    73→          }\n    74→          setError(null);\n    75→          setLoading(false);\n    76→        })\n    77→        .catch((err) => {\n    78→          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n    79→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    80→          setLoading(false);\n    81→        });\n    82→    },\n    83→    []\n    84→  );\n    85→\n    86→  // Initial fetch\n    87→  useEffect(() => {\n    88→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n    89→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    90→\n    91→  // Cleanup debounce timer and in-flight request on unmount\n    92→  useEffect(() => {\n    93→    return () => {\n    94→      if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    95→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    96→    };\n    97→  }, []);\n    98→\n    99→  // Debounced search\n   100→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n   101→    setSearchQuery(value);\n   102→    setPage(1);\n   103→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n   104→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n   105→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   106→    }, 400);\n   107→  };\n   108→\n   109→  // Immediate filter changes\n   110→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n   111→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n   112→    setPage(1);\n   113→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   114→  };\n   115→\n   116→  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n   117→    setReadingPace(value);\n   118→    setPage(1);\n   119→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n   120→  };\n   121→\n   122→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n   123→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n   124→    setPage(1);\n   125→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n   126→  };\n   127→\n   128→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n   129→    setSort(value);\n   130→    setPage(1);\n   131→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   132→  };\n   133→\n   134→  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n   135→    setPage(newPage);\n   136→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n   137→    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n   138→  };\n   139→\n   140→  const clearFilters = () => {\n   141→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n   142→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n   143→    setReadingPace(\"\");\n   144→    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n   145→    setSort(\"newest\");\n   146→    setPage(1);\n   147→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n   148→  };\n   149→\n   150→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n   151→\n   152→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   153→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   154→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   155→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   156→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n   157→    };\n   158→    return labels[f] || f;\n   159→  };\n   160→\n   161→  return (\n   162→    <div>\n   163→      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n   164→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   165→          Find your reading companion\n   166→        </h1>\n   167→        <p\n   168→          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   169→          style={{\n   170→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   171→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   172→          }}\n   173→        >\n   174→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   175→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   176→        </p>\n   177→      </div>\n   178→\n   179→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   180→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   181→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   182→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   183→            <input\n   184→              type=\"text\"\n   185→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   186→              value={searchQuery}\n   187→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   188→              className=\"input-field\"\n   189→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   190→            />\n   191→            <svg\n   192→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   193→              style={{\n   194→                position: \"absolute\",\n   195→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   196→                top: \"50%\",\n   197→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   198→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   199→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   200→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   201→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   202→              }}\n   203→              fill=\"none\"\n   204→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   205→              strokeWidth={2}\n   206→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   207→            >\n   208→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   209→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   210→            </svg>\n   211→          </div>\n   212→          <button\n   213→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   214→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   215→            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n   216→            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n   217→            style={{\n   218→              display: \"flex\",\n   219→              alignItems: \"center\",\n   220→              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n   221→              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   222→              position: \"relative\",\n   223→            }}\n   224→          >\n   225→            <svg\n   226→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   227→              width=\"16\"\n   228→              height=\"16\"\n   229→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   230→              fill=\"none\"\n   231→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   232→              strokeWidth={2}\n   233→            >\n   234→              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n   235→              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n   236→              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n   237→            </svg>\n   238→            Filters\n   239→            {hasActiveFilters && (\n   240→              <span\n   241→                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   242→                style={{\n   243→                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n   244→                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n   245→                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n   246→                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   247→                  position: \"absolute\",\n   248→                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n   249→                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n   250→                }}\n   251→              />\n   252→            )}\n   253→          </button>\n   254→        </div>\n   255→\n   256→        {/* Filter panel */}\n   257→        {filtersOpen && (\n   258→          <div\n   259→            id=\"filter-panel\"\n   260→            className=\"card mt-3\"\n   261→            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n   262→          >\n   263→            <div\n   264→              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n   265→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   266→            >\n   267→              <div>\n   268→                <label\n   269→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   270→                  style={{\n   271→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   272→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   273→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   274→                  }}\n   275→                >\n   276→                  Meeting format\n   277→                </label>\n   278→                <select\n   279→                  value={meetingFormat}\n   280→                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n   281→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   282→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   283→                >\n   284→                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n   285→                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n   286→                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n   287→                  <option className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   294→                  style={{\n   295→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   296→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   297→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   298→                  }}\n   299→                >\n   300→                  Reading pace\n   301→                </label>\n   302→                <select\n   303→                  value={readingPace}\n   304→                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n   305→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   306→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   307→                >\n   308→                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n   309→                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n   310→                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n   311→                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n   312→                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n   313→                </select>\n   314→              </div>\n   315→\n   316→              <div>\n   317→                <label\n   318→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   319→                  style={{\n   320→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   321→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   322→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   323→                  }}\n   324→                >\n   325→                  Starting from\n   326→                </label>\n   327→                <input\n   328→                  type=\"date\"\n   329→                  value={startDateFrom}\n padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   333→                />\n   334→              </div>\n   335→\n   336→              <div>\n   337→                <label\n   338→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   339→                  style={{\n   340→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   341→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   342→ value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   355→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   356→                </select>\n   357→              </div>\n   358→\n   359→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   360→                <button\n   361→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   362→                  style={{\n   363→                    color: id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: string;\n    38→  members: Member[];\n    39→  memberCount: number;\n    40→  isMember: boolean;\n    41→  isAuthor: boolean;\n    42→  hasApplied: boolean;\n    43→  applicationStatus: string;\n    44→  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n    45→  currentUserId: number | null;\n    46→  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n    47→  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n    48→  platform_preference: string;\n    49→  discord_link: string;\n    50→}\n    51→\n    52→export default function ListingDetail() {\n    53→  const { id } = useParams();\n    54→  const router = useRouter();\n    55→  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n    56→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    57→  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n    58→  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n    59→  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    60→  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    61→  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    64→  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    65→  // Discord state\n    66→  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    67→  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n    68→  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n    69→  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    70→  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    71→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    72→\n    73→  // Rating state\n    74→  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n    75→  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n    76→  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n    77→  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    78→  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    79→\n    80→  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n    81→\n    82→  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n    83→  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n    84→  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n    85→\n    86→  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    89→      const data = await res.json();\n    90→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    91→        setListing(data.listing);\n    92→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    93→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    94→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    95→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    96→      } else {\n    97→        setFetchError(true);\n    98→      }\n    99→    } catch {\n   100→      setFetchError(true);\n   101→    } finally {\n   102→      setLoading(false);\n   103→    }\n   104→  }, [id]);\n   105→\n   106→  useEffect(() => {\n   107→    fetchListing();\n   108→  }, [fetchListing]);\n   109→\n   110→  const handleDelete = async () => {\n   111→    setDeleting(true);\n   112→    setError(\"\");\n   113→    try {\n   114→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n   115→      const data = await res.json();\n   116→      if (res.ok) {\n   117→        router.push(\"/\");\n   118→      } else {\n   119→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to delete listing\");\n   120→        setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   121→      }\n   122→    } catch {\n   123→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n   124→      setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   125→    } finally {\n   126→      setDeleting(false);\n   127→    }\n   128→  };\n   129→\n   130→  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n   131→    if (!id) return;\n   132→    try {\n   133→      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n   134→      const data = await res.json();\n   135→      if (data.givenRatings) {\n   136→        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n   137→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   138→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   139→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   140→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   141→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   142→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   143→        }\n   144→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   145→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   146→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   147→      }\n   148→    } catch {\n   149→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   150→    }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"1c65da09-ebdf-4ce6-8ae8-0c556e1533a5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:41.106Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013VhQ4Se5THnU2JUBunJeW8","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"aa97b356-8995-45c2-8dc4-086ccfd0d97c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:41.944Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019QvVzi2YvecRAxiCHRpoxH","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  discord_link: string;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  max_group_size: number;\n    18→  author_name: string;\n    19→  joined_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export async function GET() {\n    23→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    24→  if (!session) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    29→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    30→    SELECT\n    31→      l.id,\n    32→      l.book_title,\n    33→      l.book_author,\n    34→      l.book_cover_url,\n    35→      l.reading_pace,\n    36→      l.start_date,\n    37→      l.meeting_format,\n    38→      l.is_full,\n    39→      l.telegram_link,\n    40→      l.discord_link,\n    41→      l.max_group_size,\n    42→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    43→      lm.joined_at,\n    44→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    45→    FROM listing_members lm\n    46→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    47→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    48→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    49→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    50→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    51→\n    52→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    53→\n    54→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    55→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    56→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    57→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    58→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    59→\n    60→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    61→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    62→  const active = readings.filter(\n    63→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({\n    67→    active,\n    68→    history,\n    69→    upcoming,\n    70→    total: readings.length,\n    71→  });\n    72→}\n    73→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"6d04ce7c-1fa0-4be5-bf5f-4d6f76f1bbd1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:42.062Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01S9SUwMjMpSrxpck3rDRHPZ","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Perfect! Now I have a complete picture. Here's the complete assessment:\n\n### Production Code - Active DELETE Operations\n\nOnly **3 production code files** contain DELETE statements:\n\n1. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts`** (Lines 365-371)\n   - **DELETE Listing Handler** - This is the primary deletion endpoint\n   - Executed when author deletes a listing (DELETE route)\n   - Executes 6 sequential DELETE statements in a transaction:\n     - `DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?`\n     - `DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?`\n     - `DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?`\n     - `DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?`\n     - `DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?`\n     - `DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?`\n\n2. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts`** (Line 128)\n   - **Telegram Webhook Handler** - Cleanup operation\n   - Removes pending group mapping after successful linking:\n     - `DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?`\n\n3. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/genres/route.ts`** (Line 61)\n   - **Genre Update Handler** - User profile management\n   - Clears all user genres before updating with new ones:\n     - `DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?`\n\n### Current Foreign Key Relationships\n\nAll foreign keys are defined **WITHOUT ON DELETE CASCADE** (lines 45-165 in db.ts):\n\n**Foreign Keys with `listings` as parent:**\n- `listings.author_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n- `listing_members.listing_id` → `listings(id)` [No cascade]\n- `pending_telegram_groups.listing_id` → `listings(id)` [No cascade]\n- `notifications.listing_id` → `listings(id)` [No cascade - **nullable**]\n- `listing_applications.listing_id` → `listings(id)` [No cascade]\n- `ratings.listing_id` → `listings(id)` [No cascade]\n\n**Foreign Keys with `users` as parent:**\n- `listing_members.user_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n- `user_genres.user_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n- `notifications.user_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n- `listing_applications.user_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n- `telegram_user_links.user_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n- `ratings.rater_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n- `ratings.rated_user_id` → `users(id)` [No cascade]\n\n### Database Schema Details\n\n**Schema file:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/db.ts` (lines 20-180)\n\n**All tables:**\n- users\n- listings\n- listing_members\n- user_genres\n- notifications\n- listing_applications\n- pending_telegram_groups\n- telegram_chats\n- telegram_user_links\n- ratings\n\n### Impact Assessment for ON DELETE CASCADE\n\n**Safe to add CASCADE for `listings` deletion:**\n1. `pending_telegram_groups.listing_id` → Would auto-clean pending group mappings\n2. `listing_members.listing_id` → Would auto-clean member records\n3. `listing_applications.listing_id` → Would auto-clean pending/approved/rejected applications\n4. `ratings.listing_id` → Would auto-clean rating records\n5. `notifications.listing_id` → **Already handles NULL** (listing_id is nullable), but CASCADE would be cleaner\n\n**Caution for `notifications.listing_id`:**\n- Currently nullable - listings can be deleted but notifications remain (just with NULL listing_id)\n- Adding CASCADE would delete notifications entirely instead of preserving them with NULL\n- Current code sends notifications AFTER deletion with NULL listing_id (see line 381 in route.ts)\n\n**NOT suitable for CASCADE:**\n- `listings.author_id` → Users can delete their profile; listings should not auto-delete (data preservation)\n- `listing_members.user_id` → Users can delete account; member records should not auto-delete\n- `user_genres.user_id` → Could use CASCADE (safe for profile deletion)\n- `listing_applications.user_id` → User deletion shouldn't cascade; could be preserved as orphaned records\n\n### Test Coverage\n\nAll 8 test files in `__tests__` use direct DELETE statements for cleanup between tests (expected behavior for test teardown).\n\n---\n\n**Summary:** The app currently manages cascading deletes manually through explicit SQL DELETE statements in the listing deletion transaction. Adding ON DELETE CASCADE for listing-related tables would eliminate this manual code and be low-risk, but requires careful consideration for notifications since they're intentionally preserved as historical records."},{"type":"text","text":"agentId: af9de793f2f208438 (use SendMessage with to: 'af9de793f2f208438' to continue this agent)\n<usage>total_tokens: 39165\ntool_uses: 14\nduration_ms: 30842</usage>"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"1e8d9d50-1d4e-4bf0-b850-274d07564c67","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:44.576Z","tool_use_result":{"status":"completed","prompt":"In /root/Projects/bookmate/app, search for any DELETE SQL statements or deletion-related code. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FsADCoTKVh4XHD9ikCwt8Y","type":"tool_result","content":"   150→    }\n   151→  }, [id]);\n   152→\n   153→  useEffect(() => {\n   154→    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n   155→      fetchRatings();\n   156→    }\n   157→  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n   158→\n   159→  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n   160→    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n   161→    if (!score) return;\n   162→    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n   163→    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n   164→    try {\n   165→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n   166→        method: \"POST\",\n   167→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   168→        body: JSON.stringify({\n   169→          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n   170→          ratedUserId: memberId,\n   171→          score,\n   172→          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n   173→        }),\n   174→      });\n   175→      const data = await res.json();\n   176→      if (!res.ok) {\n   177→        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n   178→      } else {\n   179→        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n   180→        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n   181→          ...prev,\n   182→          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n   183→        }));\n   184→      }\n   185→    } catch {\n   186→      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n   187→    } finally {\n   188→      setRatingSaving(null);\n   189→    }\n   190→  };\n   191→\n   192→  const handleJoin = async () => {\n   193→    setJoining(true);\n   194→    setError(\"\");\n   195→    try {\n   196→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   197→      const data = await res.json();\n   198→      if (!res.ok) {\n   199→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   200→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   201→          return;\n   202→        }\n   203→        setError(data.error);\n   204→        return;\n   205→      }\n   206→      await fetchListing();\n   207→    } catch {\n   208→      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n   209→    } finally {\n   210→      setJoining(false);\n   211→    }\n   212→  };\n   213→\n   214→  const handleApply = async () => {\n   215→    setApplying(true);\n   216→    setError(\"\");\n   217→    try {\n   218→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   219→      const data = await res.json();\n   220→      if (!res.ok) {\n   221→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   222→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   223→          return;\n   224→        }\n   225→        setError(data.error);\n   226→        return;\n   227→      }\n   228→      await fetchListing();\n   229→    } catch {\n   230→      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n   231→    } finally {\n   232→      setApplying(false);\n   233→    }\n   234→  };\n   235→\n   236→  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n   237→    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n   238→    setError(\"\");\n   239→    try {\n   240→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n   241→        method: \"PATCH\",\n   242→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   243→        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n   244→      });\n   245→      const data = await res.json();\n   246→      if (!res.ok) {\n   247→        setError(data.error);\n   248→        return;\n   249→      }\n   250→      await fetchListing();\n   251→    } catch {\n   252→      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n   253→    } finally {\n   254→      setDecidingId(null);\n   255→    }\n   256→  };\n   257→\n   258→  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n   259→    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   260→  };\n   261→\n   262→  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n   263→    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n   264→    : \"\";\n   265→\n   266→  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n   267→    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n   268→    setTelegramSaving(true);\n   269→    setError(\"\");\n   270→    try {\n   271→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n   272→        method: \"POST\",\n   273→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   274→        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n   275→      });\n   276→      const data = await res.json();\n   277→      if (!res.ok) {\n   278→        setError(data.error);\n   279→        return;\n   280→      }\n   281→      await fetchListing();\n   282→    } catch {\n   283→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   284→    } finally {\n   285→      setTelegramSaving(false);\n   286→    }\n   287→  };\n   288→\n   289→  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n   290→    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n   291→    setError(\"\");\n   292→    try {\n   293→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n   294→      const data = await res.json();\n   295→      if (!res.ok) {\n   296→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n   297→        return;\n   298→      }\n   299→      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n   300→    } catch {\n   301→      setError(\"Failed to connect. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XdxxnCBdXWZ3eKJmzwwRZW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01P1saxjzCDqh3JfGHaDacjf","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4650,"cache_read_input_tokens":54260,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4650,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"b38c686d-9a7c-49ea-a196-dd320674236a"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01P1saxjzCDqh3JfGHaDacjf","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"935ea51f-21ee-4ae0-ae57-e0f8415341c4","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:46.458Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01D81hkTaZMGPM4vbj9DLeda","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"a2b05657-11f2-4d13-b602-d50119e7f603","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:46.465Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FnCxdf9sD7M9RrTArSLmHx","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"7fcbbf84-34bb-43ea-976f-00a0d3918396","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:49.388Z"}

);\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (\n    45→    !discordLink ||\n    46→    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    47→    !(\n    48→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    49→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    50→    )\n    51→  ) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      {\n    54→        error:\n    55→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n    56→      },\n    57→      { status: 400 }\n    58→    );\n    59→  }\n    60→\n    61→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    62→    discordLink.trim(),\n    63→    listingId\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"e4a1fd0b-495d-4198-aa9a-f284f251e2b7","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:49.794Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NPQZvao85cABtBRng6rtT2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     9→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    14→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    15→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    18→      { status: 500 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  const body = await req.json();\n    23→  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json(\n    29→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    30→      { status: 500 }\n    31→    );\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    35→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    38→      { status: 500 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    43→  if (!bot) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    46→      { status: 500 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    51→  if (!success) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    54→      { status: 500 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  return NextResponse.json({\n    59→    ok: true,\n    60→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    61→    webhookUrl,\n    62→  });\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    67→ *\n    68→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    69→ */\n    70→export async function GET() {\n    71→  return NextResponse.json({\n    72→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    73→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    74→  });\n    75→}\n    76→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"985ebb5d-ad5e-4367-aa76-d74e1a5afc34","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:50.001Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017agztmU7VdSkmtdK4G63z1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     5→\n     6→interface BookResult {\n     7→  key: string;\n     8→  title: string;\n     9→  author_name?: string[];\n    10→  cover_i?: number;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Props {\n    14→  onSelect: (book: {\n    15→    title: string;\n    16→    author: string;\n    17→    coverUrl: string;\n    18→    olid: string;\n    19→  }) => void;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    23→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    24→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    27→  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState(false);\n    28→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    29→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    30→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    31→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    32→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    33→\n    34→  useEffect(() => {\n    35→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    36→      if (\n    37→        containerRef.current &&\n    38→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    39→      ) {\n    40→        setOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  useEffect(() => {\n    48→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    49→      setResults([]);\n    50→      return;\n    51→    }\n    52→\n    53→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    54→    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    55→\n    56→    const controller = new AbortController();\n    57→    abortRef.current = controller;\n    58→\n    59→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    60→      setLoading(true);\n    61→      setSearchError(false);\n    62→      try {\n    63→        const res = await fetch(\n    64→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n    65→          { signal: controller.signal }\n    66→        );\n    67→        const data = await res.json();\n    68→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    69→        setOpen(true);\n    70→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n    71→      } catch (err) {\n    72→        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n    73→          setResults([]);\n    74→          setSearchError(true);\n    75→        }\n    76→      } finally {\n    77→        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n    78→          setLoading(false);\n    79→        }\n    80→      }\n    81→    }, 400);\n    82→\n    83→    return () => {\n    84→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    85→      controller.abort();\n    86→    };\n    87→  }, [query]);\n    88→\n    89→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    90→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    91→    onSelect({\n    92→      title: book.title,\n    93→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    94→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    95→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    96→        : \"\",\n    97→      olid,\n    98→    });\n    99→    setQuery(book.title);\n   100→    setOpen(false);\n   101→    setActiveIndex(-1);\n   102→  };\n   103→\n   104→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n   105→    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n   106→\n   107→    switch (e.key) {\n   108→      case \"ArrowDown\":\n   109→        e.preventDefault();\n   110→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n   111→        break;\n   112→      case \"ArrowUp\":\n   113→        e.preventDefault();\n   114→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n   115→        break;\n   116→      case \"Enter\":\n   117→        e.preventDefault();\n   118→        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n   119→          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n   120→        }\n   121→        break;\n   122→      case \"Escape\":\n   123→        setOpen(false);\n   124→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n   125→        break;\n   126→    }\n   127→  };\n   128→\n   129→  // Scroll active option into view\n   130→  useEffect(() => {\n   131→    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n   132→      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n   133→      if (activeEl) {\n   134→        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n   135→      }\n   136→    }\n   137→  }, [activeIndex]);\n   138→\n   139→  const activeDescendant =\n   140→    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n   141→      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n   142→      : undefined;\n   143→\n   144→  return (\n   145→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n   146→      <input\n   147→        type=\"text\"\n   148→        className=\"input-field\"\n   149→        value={query}\n   150→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n   151→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n   152→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n   153→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n   154→        role=\"combobox\"\n   155→        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n   156→        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n   157→        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   158→        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n   159→        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n   160→        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n   161→      />\n   162→      {loading && (\n   163→        <div\n   164→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n   165→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   166→          role=\"status\"\n   167→          aria-live=\"polite\"\n   168→        >\n   169→          Searching...\n   170→        </div>\n   171→      )}\n   172→\n   173→      {searchError && !loading && (\n   174→        <div\n   175→          className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n   176→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-error, #dc2626)\" }}\n   177→          role=\"alert\"\n   178→        >\n   179→          Book search is unavailable. Please try again later.\n   180→        </div>\n   181→      )}\n   182→\n   183→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   184→        <div\n   185→          ref={listboxRef}\n   186→          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   187→          role=\"listbox\"\n   188→          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n   189→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   190→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   191→        >\n   192→          {results.map((book, index) => (\n   193→            <div\n   194→              key={book.key}\n   195→              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n   196→              role=\"option\"\n   197→              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n   198→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   199→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   200→              style={{\n   201→                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n   202→              }}\n   203→            >\n   204→              {book.cover_i ? (\n   205→                <Image\n   206→                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n   207→                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n   208→                  width={32}\n   209→                  height={48}\n   210→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n   211→                />\n   212→              ) : (\n   213→                <div\n   214→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n   215→                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n   216→                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   217→                >\n   218→                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n   219→                </div>\n   220→              )}\n   221→              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n   222→                <div\n   223→                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n   224→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   225→                >\n   226→                  {book.title}\n   227→                </div>\n   228→                <div\n   229→                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n   230→                  style={{\n   231→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   232→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   233→                  }}\n   234→                >\n   235→                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n   236→                </div>\n   237→              </div>\n   238→            </div>\n   239→          ))}\n   240→        </div>\n   241→      )}\n   242→    </div>\n   243→  );\n   244→}\n   245→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"44876123-ff7d-456d-9b99-8f46aa04ac82","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:53.747Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019n9Lf1wC5qvzCY6PPtHqzE","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     4→import { useEffect, useState, useRef } from \"react\";\n     5→import { useRouter, usePathname } from \"next/navigation\";\n     6→\n     7→interface User {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  email: string;\n    10→  displayName: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→export default function Navbar() {\n    14→  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n    15→  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n    16→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    18→  const router = useRouter();\n    19→  const pathname = usePathname();\n    20→  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    21→\n    22→  useEffect(() => {\n    23→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    24→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    25→      .then((data) => {\n    26→        if (data.user) {\n    27→          setUser(data.user);\n    28→          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n    29→        }\n    30→      })\n    31→      .catch(() => {\n    32→        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n    33→      });\n    34→  }, [pathname]);\n    35→\n    36→  // Close menus on outside click\n    37→  useEffect(() => {\n    38→    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    39→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n    40→        setMenuOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  // Close mobile menu on route change\n    48→  useEffect(() => {\n    49→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    50→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    51→  }, [pathname]);\n    52→\n    53→  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    54→    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    55→    setUser(null);\n    56→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    57→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    58→    router.push(\"/\");\n    59→    router.refresh();\n    60→  };\n    61→\n    62→  return (\n    63→    <nav\n    64→      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n    65→      style={{\n    66→        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n    67→        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n    68→      }}\n    69→    >\n    70→      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 h-14 sm:h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n    71→        <Link\n    72→          href=\"/\"\n    73→          className=\"text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold\"\n    74→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n    75→          onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n    76→        >\n    77→          bookmate\n    78→        </Link>\n    79→\n    80→        {/* Desktop nav */}\n    81→        <div className=\"hidden sm:flex items-center gap-4\">\n    82→          {user ? (\n    83→            <>\n    84→              <Link\n    85→                href=\"/listings/create\"\n    86→                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n    87→                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n    88→              >\n    89→                + New Listing\n    90→              </Link>\n    91→\n    92→              <div className=\"relative\" ref={menuRef}>\n    93→                <button\n    94→                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n    95→                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n    96→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n    97→                  aria-label={`User menu for ${user.displayName}${notifCount > 0 ? `, ${notifCount} unread notifications` : \"\"}`}\n    98→                  aria-expanded={menuOpen}\n    99→                  aria-haspopup=\"true\"\n   100→                >\n   101→                  <div\n   102→                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n   103→                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n   104→                  >\n   105→                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n   106→                  </div>\n   107→                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n   108→                    <span\n   109→                      className=\"badge text-white\"\n   110→                      style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n   111→                    >\n   112→                      {notifCount}\n   113→                    </span>\n   114→                  )}\n   115→                </button>\n   116→\n   117→                {menuOpen && (\n   118→                  <div\n   119→                    className=\"absolute right-0 top-12 w-48 card shadow-lg py-2 px-0\"\n   120→                    style={{ padding: 0 }}\n   121→                    role=\"menu\"\n   122→                    aria-label=\"User menu\"\n   123→                  >\n   124→                    <div\n   125→                      className=\"px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold truncate\"\n   126→                      style={{\n   127→                        borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n   128→                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   129→                      }}\n   130→                    >\n   131→                      {user.displayName}\n   132→                    </div>\n   133→                    <Link\n   134→                      href=\"/profile\"\n   135→                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n   136→                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n   137→                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   138→                      role=\"menuitem\"\n   139→                    >\n   140→                      Profile\n   141→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FBkxJogZmUfGeMBQAmHWn1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     6→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     7→\n     8→interface ReadingItem {\n     9→  id: number;\n    10→  book_title: string;\n    11→  book_author: string;\n    12→  book_cover_url: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  is_full: number;\n    17→  telegram_link: string;\n    18→  member_count: number;\n    19→  max_group_size: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  joined_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→interface Reputation {\n    25→  averageScore: number;\n    26→  totalRatings: number;\n    27→  completedGroups: number;\n    28→  groupsRated: number;\n    29→  breakdown: Record<number, number>;\n    30→  recentRatings: {\n    31→    score: number;\n    32→    comment: string;\n    33→    created_at: string;\n    34→    book_title: string;\n    35→  }[];\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→type TabKey = \"profile\" | \"reading\" | \"genres\" | \"reputation\";\n    39→\n    40→export default function ProfilePage() {\n    41→  const router = useRouter();\n    42→  const [displayName, setDisplayName] = useState(\"\");\n    43→  const [bio, setBio] = useState(\"\");\n    44→  const [email, setEmail] = useState(\"\");\n    45→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    46→  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n    47→  const [message, setMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    48→\n    49→  // Tab state\n    50→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabKey>(\"profile\");\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading activity\n    53→  const [active, setActive] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    54→  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    55→  const [upcoming, setUpcoming] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    56→  const [readingLoading, setReadingLoading] = useState(false);\n    57→\n    58→  // Genres\n    59→  const [userGenres, setUserGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    60→  const [availableGenres, setAvailableGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    61→  const [genresLoading, setGenresLoading] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [genresSaving, setGenresSaving] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [genresMessage, setGenresMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    64→\n    65→  // Reputation\n    66→  const [reputation, setReputation] = useState<Reputation | null>(null);\n    67→  const [reputationLoading, setReputationLoading] = useState(false);\n    68→\n    69→  // Track which tabs have been fetched to avoid redundant requests\n    70→  const fetchedTabs = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());\n    71→\n    72→  useEffect(() => {\n    73→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    74→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    75→      .then((data) => {\n    76→        if (!data.user) {\n    77→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    78→          return;\n    79→        }\n    80→        setDisplayName(data.user.displayName);\n    81→        setBio(data.user.bio || \"\");\n    82→        setEmail(data.user.email);\n    83→        setLoading(false);\n    84→      })\n    85→      .catch(() => {\n    86→        // Network error — can't verify auth, redirect to login\n    87→        router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    88→      });\n    89→  }, [router]);\n    90→\n    91→  const fetchReading = useCallback(() => {\n    92→    setReadingLoading(true);\n    93→    fetch(\"/api/profile/reading\")\n    94→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    95→      .then((data) => {\n    96→        setActive(data.active || []);\n    97→        setHistory(data.history || []);\n    98→        setUpcoming(data.upcoming || []);\n    99→        setReadingLoading(false);\n   100→      })"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"f00fb1c6-b781-4023-b257-df414c66cffb","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:57.514Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017L8tXsjyVsBwXkZMGdj4wB","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Notification {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  listing_id: number;\n     9→  type: string;\n    10→  message: string;\n    11→  is_read: number;\n    12→  created_at: string;\n    13→  book_title: string;\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→export default function NotificationsPage() {\n    17→  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);\n    18→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    19→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    20→\n    21→  useEffect(() => {\n    22→    fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n    23→      .then((r) => {\n    24→        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load notifications\");\n    25→        return r.json();\n    26→      })\n    27→      .then((data) => {\n    28→        setNotifications(data.notifications || []);\n    29→        // Mark all as read (fire-and-forget with silent catch)\n    30→        fetch(\"/api/notifications\", {\n    31→          method: \"PATCH\",\n    32→          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n    34→        }).catch(() => {});\n    35→      })\n    36→      .catch(() => {\n    37→        setError(\"Could not load notifications. Please try again.\");\n    38→      })\n    39→      .finally(() => {\n    40→        setLoading(false);\n    41→      });\n    42→  }, []);\n    43→\n    44→  if (loading) {\n    45→    return (\n    46→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n    47→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n    48→      </div>\n    49→    );\n    50→  }\n    51→\n    52→  if (error) {\n    53→    return (\n    54→      <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    55→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    56→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n    57→          <p\n    58→            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n    59→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    60→            role=\"alert\"\n    61→          >\n    62→            {error}\n    63→          </p>\n    64→          <button\n    65→            onClick={() => window.location.reload()}\n    66→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n    67→          >\n    68→            Try again\n    69→          </button>\n    70→        </div>\n    71→      </div>\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return (\n    76→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    77→      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    78→\n    79→      {notifications.length === 0 ? (\n    80→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"f436626d-f2ea-4ab9-8ed9-a16bc2087e26","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:57.991Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011mMeNRKHis3APcicvEj3A8","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→/**\n     4→ * Check SMTP config live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n     5→ * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n     6→ * permanently returning false if SMTP vars aren't set at that exact moment.\n     7→ */\n     8→function checkConfigured(): boolean {\n     9→  return (\n    10→    !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n    11→    !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n    12→    !!process.env.SMTP_FROM\n    13→  );\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n    17→\n    18→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    19→  if (!checkConfigured()) return null;\n    20→  if (!transporter) {\n    21→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    22→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    23→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    24→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    25→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    26→        ? {\n    27→            auth: {\n    28→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    29→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    30→            },\n    31→          }\n    32→        : {}),\n    33→    });\n    34→  }\n    35→  return transporter;\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→export async function sendEmail(\n    39→  to: string,\n    40→  subject: string,\n    41→  text: string,\n    42→  html?: string\n    43→): Promise<boolean> {\n    44→  const t = getTransporter();\n    45→  if (!t) return false;\n    46→\n    47→  try {\n    48→    await t.sendMail({\n    49→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    50→      to,\n    51→      subject,\n    52→      text,\n    53→      html: html || text,\n    54→    });\n    55→    return true;\n    56→  } catch (err) {\n    57→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    58→    return false;\n    59→  }\n    60→}\n    61→\n    62→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    63→  return checkConfigured();\n    64→}\n    65→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_012vFrgiZe8PTQCw3aUsvk83","session_id":"2461f1b3-284a-46b0-accd-df8549bf2929","uuid":"cabe4465-33a4-438c-8012-5b25205cc77b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T12:01:58.254Z"}
